'''鈭歠-ch-n-r''' ('''kafachneroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:characterise|characterise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:characterise|characterise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-ch-n-r
|-
! Lemma
| kafachneroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
